title: NexusNetwork (Discontinued)
description: "Nexus Network" is a carefully curated Minecraft modpack designed to enhance performance and provide an optimized experience for SMP (Survival Multiplayer) servers.
body:
"Nexus Network" is a carefully curated Minecraft modpack designed to enhance performance and provide an optimized experience for SMP (Survival Multiplayer) servers. Whether you're hosting a bustling community or joining friends on an adventure, this modpack ensures smooth gameplay with minimal lag while maintaining the core vanilla experience.
Key Features: Performance Optimization: Includes top-tier performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and Phosphor to boost FPS, reduce server strain, and enhance rendering efficiency.
    Server Stability: Packed with server-side tools to improve tick rates and manage large-scale player activity without compromising on performance.
    Quality-of-Life Improvements: Adds subtle but impactful enhancements like improved UI, better chunk loading, and customizable settings for a smoother player experience.
    Lightweight Design: Built to run efficiently on a variety of systems, ensuring accessibility for players with both high-end and low-end PCs.
